author: vvo
subject: v1.3.2
body: ## [1.3.2](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v1.3.1...v1.3.2) (2016-03-07) ### Bug Fixes * **Template:** stop leaking `data="[object Object]"` attributes in production builds ([7ec0431](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/7ec0431)), closes [#899](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/899) ### Features * **validate-pr:** Allow `docs()` commits to be merged in master ([0abc689](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/0abc689))
